Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition And Responses To Written Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions; And/Or Request For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL COSTELLO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition And Responses To Written Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions; And/Or Request For Terminating Sanctions.

Defendant Michael Costello's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition And Responses To Written Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions; and/or Request For Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Peter Daniel, Esq. 650-343-6400 Viola Law Firm for Moving party.
Sean Moriarty, Esq.650-991-5126 Cesari Werner & Moriarty for Defendant.
No appearance by Plaintiff Justin Pahceco.

Viola Law Firm, P.C. and Atty. Lawrence Viola's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for PLAINTIFF JUSTIN PACHECO.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JUSTIN PACHECO MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Before the court is Plaintiff's counsel Lawrence S. Viola and Viola Law Firm, P.C.'s motion to withdraw as counsel. Hearing required.

Granted. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
